mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, rule_id, channel_code, event_type, alert_event_id, payload_json, delivery_status, error_message, error_key, error_args, attempt, created_at FROM batch.notification_delivery_log WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch.notification_delivery_log (tenant_id, rule_id, channel_code, event_type, alert_event_id, payload_json, delivery_status, error_message, attempt) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{ruleId}, #{channelCode}, #{eventType}, #{alertEventId}, #{payloadJson}::jsonb, #{deliveryStatus}, #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attempt})
mapper.update: UPDATE batch.notification_delivery_log SET delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, attempt = #{attempt} WHERE id = #{id}
